name: Constant Contact
price_basis: Lite plan starting price, monthly, varies with contacts and sends, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: $144 a year for templates, a signup form, and one automation. Keep a sender. Fire the dashboard.
what_zo_builds: A private campaign desk with subscriber imports, signup forms, templates, scheduling, one welcome automation, and plain reports. A dedicated email API remains responsible for bulk delivery, bounces, complaints, and unsubscribes.
dont_kill_if: You rely on Constant Contact's event payments, phone support, or proven 97% delivery claim for a business-critical list. Delivery is a wall. The dashboard is not.
build_brief: Goal: replace Constant Contact Lite while preserving lawful, reliable delivery. Export contacts, consent dates, unsubscribes, templates, campaigns, and reports. Build /email on Zo for signup forms, drafting, scheduling, one welcome sequence, and campaign history. Connect a bulk-email API and process bounces, complaints, and unsubscribes. Done when a seeded test list completes signup, welcome, broadcast, unsubscribe, and suppression without exposing subscriber data publicly.
